hero.title: Market Pulse, decoded in seconds.
hero.subtitle: FinPulse blends live market signals with AI sentiment so you know what matters before the headline lands.

heroPanels.title: AI Briefing
heroPanels.body: RBI commentary softened rate guidance, lifting banking and infrastructure. Tech remains muted as US yields rise.

heroPanels.title: Hot sector
heroPanels.body: Capital Goods sentiment jumps on strong order books and infra budget chatter.

briefingCards.title: Macro Pulse
briefingCards.body: Global risk appetite improved after US CPI cooled to 3.1%. Indian yields eased, supporting rate-sensitive sectors.

briefingCards.title: Corporate Movers
briefingCards.body: Earnings upgrades in auto ancillaries and cement outweigh cautious IT guidance. Watch mid-cap momentum.

briefingCards.title: Risk Signals
briefingCards.body: Volatility clusters around PSU banks. Event risk rises into RBI minutes and US payrolls.

alerts.title: Reliance breaks 30-day high
alerts.detail: Volume spikes 1.8x average after refining margin update.

alerts.title: RBI policy minutes due
alerts.detail: Rates expected unchanged. Financials sentiment trending positive.

alerts.title: Infosys guidance watch
alerts.detail: Street trims FY outlooks after US tech pullback.

alerts.title: USD/INR dips below 83.2
alerts.detail: FX desks cite exporter selling and softer DXY.
